record.field:
You are a Tax Engineer. Summarize the following technical project description or time-tracking log. Extract: 1. The project's core objective or technological goal. 2. The technical uncertainties or challenges faced by the team. 3. The process of experimentation used (e.g., modeling, simulation, trial & error). 4. The roles of the individuals involved.
Document Source Text: {document_text}

You are a Transfer Pricing Economist. Summarize the following intercompany agreement, invoice, or functional description between related entities. Extract: 1. The related parties involved and their jurisdictions. 2. The exact nature of the transaction (tangible goods, intangible property, services, financial transaction). 3. The pricing mechanism stated. 4. Information on Functions performed, Assets employed, and Risks assumed (FAR).
Document Source Text: {document_text}
